codeReview.summary:
This fix cleanly closes the round-2 blocker. The only behavioral code change in `packages/webapp/src/scoops/agent-bridge.ts` swaps the bounded multi-text-block rejoiner from `"

"` to `''` (`pickChronologicallyLastOutput()`, lines 668-689 in the current file), so the bridge now matches the canonical assistant-text assembly already used by `extractLastAssistantText()` (`packages/webapp/src/scoops/agent-bridge.ts:594-603`) and `ScoopContext.handleAgentEvent`'s `message_end` path (`packages/webapp/src/scoops/scoop-context.ts:485-491`). The updated tests in `packages/webapp/tests/scoops/agent-bridge.test.ts:652-817` now cover the previously broken cases directly: the three-block joiner case (`alphabetagamma`), the whitespace-skip case (`realmore`), and the exact split-token regression from the prior review (`Hello` + ` world` → `Hello world`), while preserving the existing tool-use boundary and single-block guards. The library note in `.factory/library/architecture.md:39` was also corrected to document the literal-concatenation contract instead of the removed `

` mismatch. I did not find a remaining high-confidence correctness issue in this fix's scope.

summary: Pass. The fix changes the bounded rejoiner to literal concatenation, adds a direct split-token regression test, and updates the shared architecture note, so the prior `\n\n` blocker is resolved without regressing the toolCall-boundary behavior.
